reasoning: With the end of the Ukraine transit route in January 2025, Russian gas to the EU is largely limited to TurkStream (~4 bcm/quarter) and LNG (~4-5 bcm/quarter). Together, their combined max volume is heavily constrained to around 8-10 bcm/quarter and is fundamentally far below the 15 bcm/quarter threshold. Furthermore, the market crowd forecast stands at extremely low odds (1%), confirming there has been no unexpected surge in Q1-Q3 2025 data that would approach 15 bcm. I assign the lowest permitted probability of 2%.
